title: Condition monitoring of rotating equipment
text: Critical rotating equipment shall be subjected to periodic vibration condition monitoring at intervals not exceeding one month, with records maintained and trended.

title: Alignment after mechanical maintenance
text: Shaft alignment of pumps shall be verified and recorded after any mechanical seal or coupling maintenance before return to service.

title: Pressure vessel / safety valve examination
text: Every pressure vessel and its safety valve shall be examined and pop-tested by a competent person at intervals not exceeding 12 months.

title: Compressed air / gas system inspection
text: Compressed gas generating equipment shall undergo documented mechanical integrity inspection at intervals not exceeding six months.

title: Heat exchanger performance monitoring
text: Heat exchanger fouling shall be monitored by thermography or performance trending at intervals not exceeding three months.
